title: RINL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant Posts
shortInfo: Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited (RINL) has released the official Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant Notification 2026 on the official website, vizagsteel.com. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the RINL Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 65 years with qualifications such as B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines can apply through email mode up to 28-05-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

basic_details.job_title: RINL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited (RINL) has released the official Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant Notification 2026 on the official website, vizagsteel.com. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the RINL Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 65 years with qualifications such as B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines can apply through email mode up to 28-05-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit of 65 years as of the date of issuance of offer.

qualification.details: Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Coke Oven (Battery Operations and H&R): B.E / B.Sc / B.Tech in Metallurgy / Chemical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years of experience in operation of coke oven batteries with thorough knowledge in Heating & Regulation operation. Involved in end vertical and full wall repairs. Preference will be given to candidates with operation experience in coke oven by-products plant. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Coke Oven (Battery Mechanical Maintenance): B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in Mechanical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years of experience in maintenance of coke oven batteries, including pusher cars/charging cars and DE Cars, repair and alignment of buckstays, Gas collecting main brackets and structural support system in Battery, Conveyor maintenance and associated Coke over battery equipment. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Sinter Plant Maintenance: B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in Mechanical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years in operation/maintenance of Sinter Plant, including maintenance of Sinter Machines, under grate suction improvement, Sinter cooler, crushers and screens, conveyors systems and Yard equipment. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Steel Melt Shop - Convertor Operations: B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in Metallurgical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years of experience in Convertors, thorough knowledge in metallurgical process of Steel making including blowing, tapping, and secondary metallurgy, slag yard management, exposure in Refractory management. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Steel Melt Shop - Caster Operations: B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in Metallurgical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years of experience in continuous casters with knowledge in bloom and billet caster operation and Tundish Management. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Refractory Management: B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in Ceramic/Metallurgical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years in refractory management for Convertors, Ladles, Tundish, Blast Furnaces, BF Stoves, Sinter M/c Furnace and Reheating Furnace of Rolling Mills. Through knowledge in total Refractory management involving comprehensive data-driven approach to installing, maintain and monitoring refractory linings to maximize service life, reduce cost-per-tonne, and ensure safety. Hands on experience in advanced wear measurement (laser mapping), automated gunning and relining. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Centralized Maintenance Function: B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in Mechanical/Electrical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years of experience in overall maintenance of machines and equipment in an integrated steel plant. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Distribution Network: B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in Electrical engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 10 years in maintenance of 220 KV power systems, 11 KV switch yard equipment, substations, transformers. Thorough operational/maintenance knowledge high degree automated substations, Open Electrical Yard equipment, Transmission towers and insulators. Experience in Supervision of maintenance of Power system network/network components. Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant for Safety: B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in any engineering discipline from recognized University / Institution; preference will be given for Degree/Diploma in Industrial safety. Minimum 10 years in integrated steel plant with strong understanding of steel manufacturing processes (Coke Over, Blast Furnace and Steel Melting Shop), Hazard Identification & Risk Assessment (HIRA), and Process Safety Management (PSM) along with expertise in hazardous process safety, fire safety, conducting Toolbox Talks (TBT), incident investigation and regulatory compliance.

selection_process: Shortlisting of eligible applicants Personal Interview Medical fitness
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RINL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RINL Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the RINL Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant posts is 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant in RINL?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies for the Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant positions in Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for these positions is 65 years as of the date of issuance of the offer.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant roles?
faq.answer: The remuneration per month ranges from Rs. 75,000/- to Rs. 1,20,000/-, along with conveyance and accommodation allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for RINL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible applicants, followed by a personal interview and medical fitness assessment.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is required for the Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant positions?
faq.answer: A minimum of 10 years of experience in the relevant field is required, with specific experience detailed for each post in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for RINL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
